automated_suite.suite_failed_test: __tests__/stores/useAppStore.test.ts > executeAgentRun > shows 'Opening terminal...' toast and error when terminalSender is null after 500ms wait
automated_suite.suite_failure_reason: Test timed out in 5000ms — pre-existing on main, not introduced by this branch

performance.notes: Completion detection latency reduced 3x when activeRun is present. No API performance regression — polling cadence only. p95/p99 API thresholds not applicable to this client-side-only change.

owasp_checks.result: N/A — client-side hook, no access control surface

test_cases.description: Does nothing when activeRun is null
Fires clearActiveRun when task enters done with updatedAt >= startedAt
Shows completion toast when task moves to done
Uses agent displayName in toast
test_cases.notes: Falls back to agentId when agent not in availableAgents — not tested explicitly

test_cases.description: Does NOT fire when task is in in-progress, not done
Does NOT fire when task.updatedAt < startedAt (pipeline stage guard)
test_cases.notes: Critical pipeline stages 2-4 regression guard. The primary bug scenario.

test_cases.description: Calls advancePipeline when autoAdvance=true, confirmBetweenStages=false
Does NOT call advancePipeline when autoAdvance=false
Shows confirmation toast instead of advancing when confirmBetweenStages=true
Does NOT call advancePipeline when pipelineState is null
Does NOT call advancePipeline when pipelineState.status != running
Polls loadBoard every 3000ms at idle
Skips loadBoard when isMutating=true
Clears interval on unmount
Does not create multiple intervals on re-render
test_cases.notes: setInterval spy asserted to be called exactly once across 2 rerenders

test_cases.description: Resumes polling when isMutating becomes false
Polls at 1000ms when activeRun is set
Does NOT poll at 1000ms when activeRun is null
Switches to 1000ms when activeRun becomes non-null
test_cases.notes: Interval restart on activeRun change verified

test_cases.description: Switches back to 3000ms when activeRun cleared
test_cases.notes: Interval restart on activeRun → null verified

test_cases.description: Dead code: intervalMsRef declared and updated but never read in usePolling
test_cases.notes: BUG-001. Lines 41-44 in usePolling.ts. Low severity.

test_cases.description: Equal-timestamp boundary: updatedAt === startedAt not explicitly tested
test_cases.notes: BUG-002. The >= operator in code is correct but the test suite only covers strict-before and strict-after. Low severity gap.

test_cases.description: agentSettings null guard with pipelineState running
test_cases.notes: Nullish coalescing defaults (autoAdvance ?? true, confirmBetween ?? true) are safe

test_cases.description: TypeScript compilation — no type errors
test_cases.notes: npx tsc --noEmit completed with zero errors

test_cases.description: Blueprint spec uses React selector; implementation uses subscription+useState — advisory only
test_cases.notes: Both approaches are functionally equivalent. Subscription approach avoids unnecessary re-renders from selector. Advisory only.
